description_long: This is a vintage, weathered car with a turquoise blue body and a heavily rusted, off-white roof. The car features rounded contours typical of mid-20th-century American automobiles, with pronounced fenders and a streamlined rear. The paint is chipped and faded, revealing patches of rust and metal underneath, especially on the roof and door panels. The windows are opaque and appear to be covered in grime or corrosion, obscuring the interior. The wheels are metallic with visible hubcaps, and the front end has a single central headlight flanked by two smaller lights. The overall appearance suggests the car has been abandoned or left exposed to the elements for many years.
description: A vintage, turquoise car with a rusted, off-white roof and rounded, weathered bodywork. The paint is chipped and faded, with visible rust and metallic wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing a single central headlight, two smaller side lights, and the rounded, turquoise hood with rust patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the car's four doors, rusted off-white roof, and turquoise body with visible weathering and metallic wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the streamlined tail, turquoise trunk, and rusted roof, with tail lights and a central rear feature.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, rusted roof, turquoise body, and metallic wheels.
attribute_headlight_design: Single central round headlight with two smaller round side lights
